title: How Plants Grow
description: Understanding what plants need to grow and stay healthy.
subject: Science

prompts.input: What do plants need to grow? List at least three things.
hints: Think about what you give a plant to take care of it.
What does a plant get from the sun?

prompts.input: Why do you think plants are important for people and animals?
hints: What do plants make that we breathe?
